headline: AI Startup Upstage in Talks to Buy 10,000 AMD Chips in Korea
summary: Upstage Chief Executive Officer Sung Kim said he discussed the procurement of AMD’s MI355 accelerators when he met with the US chipmaker’s CEO Lisa Su in Seoul last week.  “We have a lot of Nvidia chips in Korea, but we want to diversify to other chips, including AMD’s,” Kim told Bloomberg Television on Monday.  Upstage is one of four teams competing in a state-backed race to select Korea’s best national AI foundation models.

content.title: AI Startup Upstage in Talks to Buy 10,000 AMD Chips in Korea
content.summary: Upstage Chief Executive Officer Sung Kim said he discussed the procurement of AMD’s MI355 accelerators when he met with the US chipmaker’s CEO Lisa Su in Seoul last week.  “We have a lot of Nvidia chips in Korea, but we want to diversify to other chips, including AMD’s,” Kim told Bloomberg Television on Monday.  Upstage is one of four teams competing in a state-backed race to select Korea’s best national AI foundation models.

headline: South Korean AI Contender Upstage on AMD Talks
summary: South Korean AI startup Upstage says it's in talks with its investor, AMD, for the potential purchase of 10,000 AI chips. Upstage CEO Sung Kim discusses his recent meeting with AMD chief Lisa Su in Seoul, as well as his company's edge in competing in South Korea's AI 'squid game'. He speaks with Minmin Low at the Milken Institute's "Global Investors' Symposium" in Hong Kong.

content.title: South Korean AI Contender Upstage on AMD Talks

He speaks with Minmin Low at the Milken Institute's "Global Investors' Symposium" in Hong Kong.

headline: MiTAC Computing Accelerates AI Performance in the 33th Convergence India
summary: MiTAC Computing Technology Corporation, a global leader in high-performance and energy-efficient server solutions, and a subsidiary of MiTAC Holdings Corporation (TWSE:3706), is showcasing the latest AI-optimized compute and GPU servers at Convergence India (Booth B3-28), spearheading the development of efficient and sustainable future data centers.
